mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT booking_id, MAX(paid_at) AS paid_at FROM payment WHERE status = 'PAID' GROUP BY booking_id ) p ON p.booking_id = b.id WHERE l.user_id = #{tutorId} AND b.user_id = #{studentId} AND b.id = #{bookingId} AND b.canceled_at IS NULL AND b.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(b.paid_at, p.paid_at) IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking b JOIN lesson l ON b.lesson_id = l.id JOIN tutor_availability ta ON b.availability_id = ta.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT booking_id, MAX(paid_at) AS paid_at FROM payment WHERE status = 'PAID' GROUP BY booking_id ) p ON p.booking_id = b.id WHERE l.user_id = #{tutorId} AND b.user_id = #{studentId} AND b.id = #{bookingId} AND b.canceled_at IS NULL AND b.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(b.paid_at, p.paid_at) IS NOT NULL AND ta.end_at >= NOW()

SELECT tm.id, tm.booking_id AS bookingId, tm.tutor_id AS tutorId, tm.student_id AS studentId, tm.sender_role AS senderRole, tm.content, tm.created_at AS createdAt, u.name AS studentName FROM tutor_message tm JOIN users u ON tm.student_id = u.id JOIN ( SELECT booking_id, MAX(created_at) AS latest_created_at FROM tutor_message WHERE tutor_id = #{tutorId} AND sender_role = 'STUDENT' GROUP BY booking_id ) latest ON latest.booking_id = tm.booking_id AND latest.latest_created_at = tm.created_at WHERE tm.tutor_id = #{tutorId} AND tm.sender_role = 'STUDENT' ORDER BY tm.created_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT tm.id, tm.booking_id AS bookingId, tm.tutor_id AS tutorId, tu.name AS tutorName, tm.student_id AS studentId, su.name AS studentName, tm.sender_role AS senderRole, tm.content, tm.created_at AS createdAt FROM tutor_message tm JOIN users tu ON tm.tutor_id = tu.id JOIN users su ON tm.student_id = su.id WHERE tm.tutor_id = #{tutorId} AND tm.student_id = #{studentId} AND tm.booking_id = #{bookingId} ORDER BY tm.created_at ASC LIMIT 200
